ASBESTOS SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2004 Continued To Nov-24-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 611
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 611, 1:30PM: Judge Diane Wick, clerk-Beth Wilber: cause called for settlement conference, Steve Patti appearing for plaintiff, Drew Burford appearing for Kelly-Moore, Alsion Nafy appearing for Pacific Coast. Counsel met and confer re possibility of settlement. Mr. Patti tells the court he thinks the case is close to settling. Matter is continued for another week, to 11/24/04, 1:30pm, for further settlement conference.
